description: Sample published namedQuery used by virtual-model wizard E2E (Phase 1 P1.2). Lists basic showcase records.
fromSql: SELECT pid, sc_name, sc_code, sc_status FROM mt_showcase_all_fields WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} ORDER BY pid DESC LIMIT 100

title:zh-CN: 军火展 — 月度商机与赢单
description: Monthly opportunity value against won value, bucketed by expected close date. Exists because the aggregate data source cannot bucket time (dimensions must be bare identifiers, so date_trunc is unreachable).
purpose: Drives the arsenal dashboard's monthly bar chart with real opportunity data.
fromSql: SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', crm_opp_expected_close_date), 'YYYY-MM') AS month, COALESCE(SUM(crm_opp_expected_amount), 0) AS pipeline_amount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN crm_opp_stage = 'closed_won' THEN crm_opp_expected_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS won_amount FROM mt_crm_opportunity WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} AND crm_opp_expected_close_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

title:zh-CN: 军火展 — 月度商机趋势
description: Opportunity count vs won count per month. Same time-bucketing constraint as sc_arsenal_monthly_pipeline.
purpose: Drives the arsenal dashboard's trend line chart.
fromSql: SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', crm_opp_expected_close_date), 'YYYY-MM') AS month, COUNT(*) AS opp_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE crm_opp_stage = 'closed_won') AS won_count FROM mt_crm_opportunity WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} AND crm_opp_expected_close_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

title:zh-CN: 军火展 — 累计赢单收入
description: Running total of won amount by month, via a window function. Unreachable from the aggregate data source, which has no window/cumulative support.
purpose: Drives the arsenal dashboard's cumulative area chart.
fromSql: SELECT month, SUM(won_amount) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS cumulative_amount FROM (SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', crm_opp_expected_close_date), 'YYYY-MM') AS month, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN crm_opp_stage = 'closed_won' THEN crm_opp_expected_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS won_amount FROM mt_crm_opportunity WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} AND crm_opp_expected_close_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1) monthly ORDER BY month

description: Won deals as a percentage of closed deals. A ratio metric (a/b), which the aggregate data source cannot express — its aggregation set is closed at count/count_distinct/sum/avg/max/min.
purpose: Drives the arsenal dashboard's win-rate KPI card.
fromSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE crm_opp_stage = 'closed_won') / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE crm_opp_stage IN ('closed_won', 'closed_lost')), 0), 1) AS win_rate FROM mt_crm_opportunity WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId}

title:zh-CN: 军火展 — 商机看板明细
description: Per-opportunity detail rows for the kanban widget. The aggregate data source always GROUP BYs and rejects a request with no metric or dimension, so it cannot return detail rows.
purpose: Drives the arsenal dashboard's kanban board (one card per opportunity, grouped by stage).
fromSql: SELECT crm_opp_name AS opp_name, crm_opp_stage AS opp_stage, COALESCE(crm_opp_expected_amount, 0) AS opp_amount, COALESCE(crm_opp_owner, '') AS opp_owner FROM mt_crm_opportunity WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} ORDER BY crm_opp_expected_amount DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 60
